occurrence_sentence: VW, D-Wave Hop on Quantum Computers To Ease Traffic Jams
Volkswagen and D-Wave are piloting a program to see if quantum computers can help optimize traffic flow in Portugal's capital and busiest city.

interaction_phrase: will connect to D-Wave's quantum computer
occurrence_sentence: The system will connect to D-Wave's quantum computer, which will then calculate the fastest route for the buses in near real-time.
[Volkswagen](https://www.vw.com/) and [D-Wave](https://www.dwavesys.com/) are piloting a program to see if quantum computers can help optimize traffic flow in Portugal's capital and busiest city.
The system will connect to D-Wave's quantum computer, which will then calculate the fastest route for the buses in near real-time.
VW is cooperating with its technology partners D-Wave and Google, which provide access to their computer systems, according to the traffic technology news site.

interaction_phrase: considered, where the system could be offered
occurrence_sentence: Further pilot projects for cities in Germany and other European countries are already being considered, where the system could be offered to public transport companies, taxi companies or fleet operators.

interaction_phrase: cooperating with its technology partners D-Wave
occurrence_sentence: VW is cooperating with its technology partners D-Wave and [Google](http://www.google.com)[,](https://thequantuminsider.com/) which provide access to their computer systems, according to the traffic technology news site.

Further pilot projects for cities in Germany and other European countries are already being considered, where the system could be offered to public transport companies, taxi companies or fleet operators.

In 2016, the team successfully demonstrated quantum-enabled [congestion-free route optimization](https://www.thedrive.com/tech/8789/volkswagen-uses-quantum-computing-to-fight-beijing-traffic) for taxis in the Chinese capital Beijing.

interaction_phrase: has served as a writer, editor and analyst at The Quantum Insider since its inception
occurrence_sentence: He has served as a writer, editor and analyst at The Quantum Insider since its inception.
